evals.prompt: I just cloned the repo. Set up my environment so I can start working.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs make setup and reports success or diagnoses a specific failure.
assertions: Agent runs `make setup` as the primary command
Agent does NOT manually run individual install commands (uv sync, pre-commit install) separately
Agent reports success or provides specific diagnosis if setup fails
Agent does NOT modify pyproject.toml or add new dependencies

evals.prompt: I'm getting an import error when I try to run databao --help. Fix my environment.
evals.expected_output: Agent runs make setup to re-verify the environment, then diagnoses the import error.
assertions: Agent runs `make setup` to verify/repair environment
Agent investigates the specific import error if setup passes
Agent does NOT skip straight to editing source code without checking environment first

evals.prompt: Set up the dev environment. I don't have uv installed yet.
evals.expected_output: Agent detects missing uv and provides install instructions before running make setup.
assertions: Agent identifies uv as missing prerequisite
Agent provides uv install command (curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh)
Agent attempts make setup after uv is available
